pr.title: Add Claude API chatbot demo + AI Tool Demo Production Kit (27 files)
pr.body:
## Summary

This PR adds two independent systems to the repo:

### 1. Claude API Chatbot Demo (`src/` + `demo/`)
Working Python chatbot using the Anthropic SDK — basic multi-turn version and a streaming + prompt-caching version. Includes full tutorial, voiceover copy, visual prompts, and publishing package.

### 2. AI Tool Demo Production Kit (`demo-production-kit/`) — 27 files

A repeatable system for planning, scripting, recording, and publishing AI tool demo videos. Claude Code handles all planning and scripting; manual recording is done by the creator.

**Label: All workflows marked SIMULATED — no live tool testing was performed.**

---

## File Map

### 10 Reusable Templates
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `README.md` | Kit overview and how-to-use guide |
| `obs-recording-setup.md` | OBS scenes, output settings, hotkeys, audio config |
| `demo-workflow-template.md` | Blank template for any new AI tool demo |
| `ai-tool-test-scorecard.md` | 10-dimension scoring rubric (1–5 per dimension) |
| `screen-recording-shot-list.md` | 11-shot checklist with OBS scene assignments |
| `voiceover-script-template.md` | Long-form + 60-second script structures + delivery notes |
| `caption-and-title-template.md` | YouTube, TikTok, Reels, Shorts, Twitter, LinkedIn copy templates |
| `thumbnail-brief-template.md` | 4 thumbnail formulas + AI generation prompts |
| `asset-folder-structure.md` | File naming convention + folder layout for every demo |
| `post-recording-edit-checklist.md` | 12-step post-production checklist (audio, captions, exports, publishing) |

### 15-Tool Demo Backlog (`tool-backlog/`)
One file per tool, each containing: demo angle, audience pain point, hook options, step-by-step test workflow, shot-by-shot recording plan, what to say, evaluation criteria (10 dimensions), asset/product angle, CTA, and production notes.

| Tool | Priority | Best angle |
|------|----------|-----------|
| ChatGPT | ★★★★★ | Custom instructions + multi-turn workflow |
| Claude | ★★★★★ | Projects + document analysis |
| Perplexity | ★★★★☆ | Google replacement for cited research |
| Gemini | ★★★★☆ | AI inside Gmail, Docs, Sheets |
| Canva AI | ★★★★★ | Magic Design + Magic Write + AI image |
| Gamma | ★★★★☆ | 10-slide deck from one prompt in 47 seconds |
| HeyGen | ★★★☆☆ | AI avatar video + translation |
| Runway | ★★★☆☆ | Text to cinematic video clip |
| Zapier AI | ★★★★☆ | Plain-English automation builder |
| Make AI | ★★★☆☆ | Visual multi-path automation vs Zapier |
| ElevenLabs | ★★★★☆ | Human-quality AI voiceover |
| Descript | ★★★★☆ | Edit video by editing text |
| Notion AI | ★★★★☆ | AI search + drafting inside Notion |
| Airtable AI | ★★★☆☆ | AI fields inside a database |
| Replit Agent | ★★★★★ | Build a web app from plain English |

`index.md` — prioritized table with best platform, content angle, recording difficulty, suggested asset, and an 8-week recording schedule.

### Sample Demo (`sample-demos/`)
**`canva-ai-complete-demo-plan.md`** — fully written, ready-to-record:
- 60-second Shorts/Reels/TikTok script with on-screen text overlay plan
- 3-minute YouTube script (bullet-point delivery notes)
- 18-step screen recording checklist
- 5 B-roll prompts for AI video generators
- Thumbnail concept (Formula B) with AI generation prompt
- 4 title options with platform recommendations
- YouTube description + TikTok/Reels caption with hashtags
- Pinned comment template
- Sellable asset: Canva AI Creator Pack ($19–$39) with full contents breakdown
- Manual testing notes section (to fill after live recording)

---

## Test Plan
- [ ] Review `demo-production-kit/README.md` for accuracy
- [ ] Confirm all 15 tool backlog files follow the same structure
- [ ] Open `tool-backlog/index.md` and verify all file links resolve
- [ ] Open `sample-demos/canva-ai-complete-demo-plan.md` — use it to record a real Canva AI demo
- [ ] Fill in `ai-tool-test-scorecard.md` after live testing any tool
- [ ] Run `find demo-production-kit -type f | sort` to verify 27 files present

## Ground Rules Applied
- No money spent, no accounts created, no content published
- No paid credits used
- No private data exposed
- All workflows labeled SIMULATED / MANUAL RECORDING REQUIRED
- No tool claimed as live-tested

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RCAwXvg6RChg5JD3YrGNqQ
pr.author: AISignalOS
